name: Suspicious Partner
overview: No Ji-Wook is a prosecutor in the Central District Prosecutors’ Office who ends up switching professions to a private attorney. He harbors a trauma stemming from an event in his childhood involving his parents and his first love. Eun Bong-Hee, a Taekwondo athlete in her youth, is a prosecutor trainee who has become a murder suspect. Eun Bong-Hee and No Ji-Wook both find themselves being the focus of a killer.

trailers.title: Love in Trouble (Suspicious Partner) (Trailer w/ Eng Subs)
Love In Trouble (#수상한파트너) Teaser #2 | Available on Viu 12 hours after Korea
